name: White Chocolate Nut Cookies
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces White chocolate baking bar, cut into 1/4 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Cream together the Golden Crisco shortening and milk in a large bowl using medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended.
3. Gradually add brown and granulated sugar, beating in the egg and vanilla extract.
4. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Add this mixture to the creamed ingredients. Mix well.
5. Stir in the white chocolate pieces and nuts.
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls (15 mL) of dough about 2 inches (5 cm) apart onto an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake for 8 minutes at 375°F (190°C). Allow to cool on the baking sheet for one minute before transferring to a cooling rack.
Makes: 5 dozen 2-inch (5 cm) cookies
